Title: User successfully logs in
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User calls the login operation on the Server with the provided credentials.
2. Server verifies the credentials.
3. Server returns a token to the User.
4. User sends the token to the API_Manager.
5. API_Manager processes the request and returns a status.
6. User receives the status from the API_Manager.
Expected Result: User receives a valid token and status indicating successful login.

Title: User fails to log in due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User provides incorrect username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User calls the login operation on the Server with the provided credentials.
2. Server verifies the credentials.
3. Server returns an error message to the User.
4. User receives the error message from the Server.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating failed login attempt.

Title: User fails to log in due to missing credentials
Preconditions: User omits one or both of the required fields.
Test Steps:
1. User calls the login operation on the Server with the provided credentials.
2. Server verifies the credentials.
3. Server returns an error message to the User.
4. User receives the error message from the Server.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating missing credentials.

Title: User successfully posts a service
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid token.
Test Data:
- Title: New Service
- Description: This is a new service.
- Creator: testuser
Test Steps:
1. User calls the post operation on the Service with the provided details.
2. Service validates the input.
3. Service stores the new service.
4. Service returns a confirmation message to the User.
5. User receives the confirmation message from the Service.
Expected Result: User receives a confirmation message indicating successful service posting.

Title: Main component successfully requests data
Preconditions: Main component has a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. Main calls the getToken operation on the LocalUser.
2. LocalUser returns the token to Main.
3. Main sends the token to the API_Manager.
4. API_Manager processes the request and returns a status.
5. Main receives the status from the API_Manager.
Expected Result: Main receives a valid status indicating successful data request.

Title: Main component fails to request data due to invalid token
Preconditions: Main component has an invalid token.
Test Steps:
1. Main calls the getToken operation on the LocalUser.
2. LocalUser returns the token to Main.
3. Main sends the invalid token to the API_Manager.
4. API_Manager returns an error status to Main.
5. Main receives the error status from the API_Manager.
Expected Result: Main receives an error status indicating failed data request.

Title: Main component fails to request data due to missing token
Preconditions: Main component does not have a token.
Test Steps:
1. Main calls the getToken operation on the LocalUser.
2. LocalUser returns null to Main.
3. Main attempts to send the null token to the API_Manager.
4. API_Manager returns an error status to Main.
5. Main receives the error status from the API_Manager.
Expected Result: Main receives an error status indicating missing token.

Title: User successfully retrieves a service
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. User calls the getPost operation on the Service with the provided ID.
2. Service retrieves the service with the given ID.
3. Service returns the service details to the User.
4. User receives the service details from the Service.
Expected Result: User receives the service details indicating successful retrieval.

Title: User fails to retrieve a service due to invalid ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. User calls the getPost operation on the Service with the provided ID.
2. Service attempts to retrieve the service with the given ID.
3. Service returns an error message to the User.
4. User receives the error message from the Service.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating failed retrieval due to invalid ID.

Title: User fails to retrieve a service due to missing ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid token.

Title: User successfully retrieves comments for a service
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a valid token.
Test Steps:

2. Service retrieves the comments for the given service ID.
3. Service returns the comments to the User.
4. User receives the comments from the Service.
Expected Result: User receives the comments indicating successful retrieval.
